note: Pinned baseline used when the leaderboard file is not yet committed to the main branch (bootstrap). Once docs/leaderboard/cubrim-leaderboard.json is committed to main, gates read it via git show main: and this file becomes a dead fallback. Update this file in the gate dir (not in a candidate branch) whenever the baseline advances. NOTE: the aggregate is measured via the competitive rail (compress with --value-scheme bwt-rans, which selects the smallest of schemes 7/8/9/10 per file). The codec's bare default (no flag) is bitpack (0.556651); always measure champions through the competitive flag.
